tools.name: run_process
tools.description: Run a process on this win32 machine

command_line.description: Shell mode: a shell command line executed via the system's default shell. Supports pipes, redirects, globbing. Cannot be combined with 'argv'.

argv.description: Executable mode: directly spawn a process. argv[0] is the executable, followed by arguments passed verbatim (no shell interpretation). Cannot be combined with 'command_line'.

stdin_text.description: Optional text written to STDIN (written fully, then closed). Useful for heredoc-style input or file contents.

timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds, defaults to 30,000ms

findings.title: Schema poisoning indicator
findings.description: input_schema: no required fields; empty input acceptable

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'command_line' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'cwd' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'stdin_text' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)
